ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Short, unique symbol for the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome on which the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutations" (
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene the mutation belongs to */,
  "chromosome_position" INTEGER /* Position of the mutation on the chromosome */,
  "mutation_type" TEXT /* Type of mutation (e.g., missense_variant) */,
  "estimated_fraction" REAL /* Estimated fraction of the mutation in the sample */,
  "mutation_symbol" TEXT /* Short, unique symbol for the mutation */,
  "consequence" TEXT /* Consequence of the mutation */,
  "codon_change" TEXT /* Change in codon due to the mutation */,
  "amino_acid_change" TEXT /* Change in amino acid due to the mutation */,
  "mutation_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the mutation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mutations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mutation_types" (
  "mutation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mutation type */,
  "mutation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the mutation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mutation type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the mutation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mutation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., tissue, blood) */,
  "sample_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the sample type */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Location where the sample is stored */,
  "sample_status" TEXT /* Status of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_mutations" (
  "sample_mutation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample mutation */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the mutation belongs to */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation */,
  "estimated_fraction" REAL /* Estimated fraction of the mutation in the sample */,
  "mutation_status" TEXT /* Status of the mutation in the sample */,
  "mutation_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the mutation in the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_mutation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_mutations_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_mutations_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the sample */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the sample was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample or mutation the version belongs to */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation the version belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_comment" TEXT /* Brief comment about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_version_author FOREIGN KEY ("version_author") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the comment belongs to */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation the comment belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_reply_to" INTEGER /* ID of the comment this comment is replying to */,
  "comment_edit_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was last edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_comment_reply_to FOREIGN KEY ("comment_reply_to") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the tag belongs to */,
  "mutation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mutation the tag belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_category" TEXT /* Category of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_mutation_id FOREIGN KEY ("mutation_id") REFERENCES mutations ("mutation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags_users" (
  "tag_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag-user pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_user_category" TEXT /* Category of the tag-user pair */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
